goal: exists(k0: T) { equivalence_class(r, a) = equivalence_class(r, k0) }
proof: function(x0: T) { equivalence_class(r, a) != equivalence_class(r, x0) }(a)
let w0: T satisfy { equivalence_class(r, w0) = equivalence_class(r, a) }
function[T0](x0: (T0, T0) -> Bool, x1: Set[T0]) { exists(k0: T0) { equivalence_class[T0](x0, k0) = x1 } = is_equivalence_class[T0](x0, x1) }[T](r, equivalence_class(r, a))
equivalence_class(r, b) != equivalence_class(r, a) or not is_equivalence[T](r)
not is_equivalence[T](r) or not r(a, b)

goal: equivalence_class(r, a) = equivalence_class(r, b) = r(a, b)
proof: equivalence_class(r, b) = equivalence_class(r, a) or r(a, b)
